available_tools.description: This API searches for a given symptom for emergency knowledge.
available_tools.name: EmergencyKnowledge

results.description: The list of results. Format be like [{"name":possible disease name, "aid": first-aid method},...]

normalized_goal_template: can you help me find some information about a headache i have a headache and it s really bothering me

output.aid: Treatment may involve medications to manage symptoms and prevent attacks, lifestyle changes to avoid triggers, and in some cases, preventive medications.

output.aid: Treatment may involve over-the-counter pain relievers, lifestyle changes, and stress management techniques.
output.name: Tension headache

output.aid: Treatment may involve medications to manage symptoms and prevent attacks, as well as oxygen therapy and nerve blocks in some cases.
output.name: Cluster headache

user_goal:
Can you help me find some information about a headache?
I have a headache and it's really bothering me.

available_tools.description: This API queries the recorded health data in database of a given user and time span.
available_tools.name: QueryHealthData

health_data.description: The health data of the given user and time span.

end_time.description: The end time of the time span. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

start_time.description: The start time of the time span. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

user_id.description: The user id of the given user. Cases are ignored.

normalized_goal_template: can you please modify my appointment scheduled for march th with dr kim to march th with dr lee the appointment id is and the new date is march th with dr lee can you also check my health data for the past week my user id is j  and i want to check from march th to march th actually can you cancel the appointment instead of modifying it the appointment id is the patient name is olivia davis the date is october th and the doctor name is dr smith
user_goal:
Can you please modify my appointment scheduled for March 25th with Dr. Kim to March 26th with Dr. Lee?
The appointment ID is 34567890 and the new date is March 26th with Dr. Lee.
Can you also check my health data for the past week?
My user ID is J46801 and I want to check from March 5th to March 12th.
Actually, can you cancel the appointment instead of modifying it?
The appointment ID is 90123456, the patient name is Olivia Davis, the date is October 10th, and the doctor name is Dr. Smith.

output.description: Modify a reminder API that takes three parameters - 'token'，'content' and 'time'.
